tasks.subject: Refactor components/LetterGeneratorWorkspaceV2.tsx by extracting the generation orchestration into services/document-generation-service.ts. Preserve the existing behavior exactly. The service should accept round, caseId, parsed source, routes, references, templates, evidence, affidavit source, affidavit jurisdiction, and document date, then return outputs, warnings, zip name, and zip blob. Keep the UI component responsible only for state updates and status messages. Do not change packet order. Use lib/generation-contract.ts and lib/workflow-framework.ts as the authoritative workflow policy.
